textByHash.2545dde96b660db5ab7aa2e7991edad2c3711cb5: You'd best not keep the king waiting, try tracking down Kruk's movements.
textByHash.3dd38f6ca6fcaa738db7ff8a4c761b7d982966c6: I wish Kruk would do his own dirty work.
textByHash.411183a79007a525e170f6a5b69efc0aeacfe3e5: Your guess is as good as mine, you didn't hear it from me, but he's been disappearing from his post a lot lately...
textByHash.51c8964f16426b8400a2ba2eab8502369d8d6418: Sorry, I am far too busy to speak right now.
textByHash.61476334059bb2f16b983197fcb70aab86bd548a: You! Get out of my way!
textByHash.663936c41fc06021bd153d30570877be3a15bd47: Hmm, I don't think this is quite right.
textByHash.69dde7e5319091d35a4273884cb7a677c2f59641: There's only one way off the wall, and that's down the Western ramp to the shore. I know that's where I'd start looking.
textByHash.a7a5b56b659b90d31112c1e1734e6417163efc90: You might be able to track him down if you've got what it takes, although I wouldn't want to be the one caught sneaking up on Kruk!
textByHash.cc595fa9d12e579875b5bdafe106c2f40d846f80: This looks like a good spot.
textByHash.e2d90040a54b72f14b0286c71bc60059d513e7f5: After years of planning, the humans are going to get what they deserve.
textByHash.f6a3f8e9f611895c39812a112e3a82fe44aef1a1: The time of monkeys is almost upon us.
